title: DTE Energy (DTE) Posts Lower-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
text: DTE Energy's (DTE) first-quarter operating net income totals $274 million compared with $448 million in the year-ago quarter.

title: DTE Energy reports first quarter earnings and accomplishments
text: DETROIT, April 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) today reported first quarter earnings of $445 million or $2.16 per diluted share, compared with $394 million, or $2.03 per diluted share in 2022.

title: What's in the Cards for DTE Energy (DTE) in Q1 Earnings?
text: DTE Energy's (DTE) Q1 results are likely to reflect the impacts of warmer-than-normal weather patterns and a higher rate-based cost. However, grid strengthening might have boosted the Q1 performance.

title: Why DTE Energy (DTE) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: DTE Energy (DTE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: DTE Energy schedules first quarter 2023 earnings release, conference call
text: Detroit, April 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- DETROIT, Apr. 13, 2023 – DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) will announce its first quarter 2023 earnings before the market opens Thursday, Apr. 27, 2023.
